title: Guess The Matt Damon Movie From Just One Line — No Names, No Cheating
dek: He's currently owning box offices as Odysseus in Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey, but can you name the movie behind these eight iconic Matt Damon lines with zero other clues?

items.quote: How do you like them apples?
You can tell her that when you found me, I was with the only brothers I had left. And that there was no way I was deserting them. I think she'd understand that.

I can tell you the license plate numbers of all six cars outside. I can tell you that our waitress is left-handed and the guy sitting up at the counter weighs two hundred and fifteen pounds and knows how to handle himself.
If you can't spot the sucker in your first half hour at the table, then you are the sucker.
I always thought it would be better to be a fake somebody than a real nobody.
Don't leave me alone with these guys!
My Appaloosa will be galloping when that big American stud of yours is winded and collapsed.
In the face of overwhelming odds, I'm left with only one option. I'm gonna have to science the shit out of this!
